mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOWNLOAD_LOG_TB ( USER_ID, SBK_NO, DAV_PATH, IS_FOLDER, MODE, FILE_NAME, ZIP_NAME, CONTENT_TYPE, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT, RESULT_CD, ERR_MSG, BYTES_SENT, CREAT_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sbkNo}, #{davPath}, #{isFolder}, #{mode}, #{fileName}, #{zipName}, #{contentType}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{resultCd}, #{errMsg}, #{bytesSent}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE DOWNLOAD_LOG_TB SET RESULT_CD = #{resultCd}, ERR_MSG = #{errMsg}, BYTES_SENT = #{bytesSent}, UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}
